text: The gentle hush of this modern hallway feels like a pause in the rush of life. I sense anticipation, as though just beyond the glass doors, ideas are waiting to be discovered. When I step into the R+D exhibit, the bold colors and thoughtful text speak to me about curiosity and creativity. Here, reflection is encouraged; uncertainty is welcomed. I feel inspired and reminded that progress is born from questioning the unknown, and that, in this moment, I am part of that search for meaning.
